extortion.description: HKR Architects is a prominent international architecture and urban design practice founded in 1992, with offices located in London, Dublin, Dubai, and Abu Dhabi. The firm specializes in various sectors including living, working, staying, masterplanning, modular, and learning environments. Their services cater to a diverse range of clients seeking innovative architectural solutions. HKR Architects is committed to delivering high-quality design and planning services across multiple regions.
